title: INIT attribute not set on FDRE when shift register inference
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`yosys -p "synth_xilinx; dump t:FDRE" lfsr_24.v`

```
module lfsr_24 (input clk, output dout);
  reg [24:1] state = 24'b0;
  always @(posedge clk)
    state <= { state[24-1:1], state[24] ~^ state[23] ~^ state[22] ~^ state[17] };
  assign dout = state[24];
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

`FDRE` to have `INIT` parameter set to `1'b0`

## Actual behavior

`FDRE` has `INIT` parameter set to `1'bx`
```
<<SNIP>>
  cell \FDRE $auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.fpga_srl_1
    parameter \INIT 1'x
    connect \C \clk
    connect \CE 1'1
    connect \D $auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.T0
    connect \Q \state [16]
    connect \R 1'0
  end
<<SNIP>>
```
Works when shift register inference disabled (`synth_xilinx -nosrl`).
Could this be related to #956 (though there are no warning messages as that issue has)

But I did notice this:
```
2.27. Executing DFFINIT pass (set INIT param on FF cells).
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.fpga_srl_1.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [16]) to 1'x.
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$40.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [22]) to 1'0.
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$41.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [23]) to 1'0.
Removing init attribute from wire lfsr_24.state.
Removed 0 unused cells and 47 unused wires.
```
code_blocks:
<<SNIP>>
  cell \FDRE $auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.fpga_srl_1
    parameter \INIT 1'x
    connect \C \clk
    connect \CE 1'1
    connect \D $auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.T0
    connect \Q \state [16]
    connect \R 1'0
  end
<<SNIP>>

2.27. Executing DFFINIT pass (set INIT param on FF cells).
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$18.fpga_srl_1.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [16]) to 1'x.
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$40.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [22]) to 1'0.
Setting lfsr_24.$auto$simplemap.cc:420:simplemap_dff$41.INIT (port=Q, net=\state [23]) to 1'0.
Removing init attribute from wire lfsr_24.state.
Removed 0 unused cells and 47 unused wires.
